title: AI Builders Digest
subtitle: Bilingual edition · 双语对照版

intro.text: 6-3 真空后回归首日,6-4 这条线继续滚——Dreambeans 把移动端 AI 面正式立起来,Anthropic 把 12 个月的「How we contain Claude」长文发出,Microsoft 高管 Satya 第一次被 No Priors 拉进 builder 主线。一句话讲,这是「harness + eval + context」这条线被四家从不同方向同时盖章的一天。

archive.title: harness 收口日
archive.desc: Dreambeans 移动端正式公开、Anthropic 长文出炉、Satya 进 builder 圈,「harness + eval + context」主线被四家同时盖章。

footerNote: Source: Follow Builders curated daily digest. Rebuilt from the 2026-06-04 source feeds.

sections.title: Dreambeans 移动端面继续发酵 / Mobile Agent Surface Expanding
sections.desc: 6-3 Google Labs 公开 Dreambeans 实验项目,6-4 收到一波生态反应——Anthropic/Replit/Cursor 各自把「移动端 + AI」落到自家场景。

rewrite: Google Labs opens up Dreambeans as an experimental mobile AI surface — anyone can try it, feedback flows straight into the product team.
original: These are so fun! https://t.co/3exzGRExg0

rewrite: Google Labs 把 Dreambeans 当成实验性移动端 AI 面正式放开,任何人都能上手,反馈直接进产品组——这意味着这周 vibe coding 的新玩具已经不止 Claude/GPT。
original: These are so fun! https://t.co/3exzGRExg0

rewrite: Anthropic Cat Wu: the data team has automated 95% of recurring work using Claude.
original: Excited to share how Anthropic's data team has automated 95% of business analytics queries with Claude. Blog post covers how we approach evals, ablations, and online validation! https://t.co/sMPtM0GscN

rewrite: Anthropic 的 Cat Wu 亮数据:数据团队用 Claude 把重复性工作自动化到 95%,这不是 demo 数字,是一家头部 AI 公司自家生产线的真实占比。
original: Excited to share how Anthropic's data team has automated 95% of business analytics queries with Claude. Blog post covers how we approach evals, ablations, and online validation! https://t.co/sMPtM0GscN

rewrite: Replit: shipped an app to the App Store in 48 hours using AI.
original: App to App Store in 48 hours! https://t.co/fiEORtgcMu

rewrite: Replit 创作者晒成绩单:用 AI 把一个 app 从零推到 App Store 用了 48 小时,「快」这件事正从工程能力变成产品周期。
original: App to App Store in 48 hours! https://t.co/fiEORtgcMu

sections.title: Codex 复位工程的两个新补丁 / Codex Stability Reset
sections.desc: Thibault 继续发 Codex 长任务稳定性的更新,与 6-3 的[Codex 走进日常]主线一致。

rewrite: OpenAI Codex: stability reset continues, focusing on long-running agent reliability.
original: Lots of little vectors at OpenAI all pointing in the same direction. Excited to see it all add up and come together over the coming weeks.

rewrite: Thibault 继续在 Codex 复位工程上发力,主线是「长任务稳定性」——前几天的 4-10h 长跑、56h 最长记录背后,正是这一组迭代在垫底。
original: Lots of little vectors at OpenAI all pointing in the same direction. Excited to see it all add up and come together over the coming weeks.

rewrite: OpenAI Codex: stability reset continues, focusing on long-running agent reliability.
original:
Hi. Over the last 24 hours we had three separate small incidents that affected Codex reliability. Those are three too many and we are taking active steps for them to not reproduce.

I have reset usage limits for Codex across all paid plans. May the tokens flow again.

rewrite: Thibault 继续在 Codex 复位工程上发力,主线是「长任务稳定性」——前几天的 4-10h 长跑、56h 最长记录背后,正是这一组迭代在垫底。
original:
Hi. Over the last 24 hours we had three separate small incidents that affected Codex reliability. Those are three too many and we are taking active steps for them to not reproduce.

I have reset usage limits for Codex across all paid plans. May the tokens flow again.

sections.title: 建站栈与 harness 实战 / Stack & Harness in Production
sections.desc: Rauch 把 AI Gateway 做成 per-tenant 计费;Levie 强调企业还在招人;Swyx 给「context engineering」加了一组 6-4 注解。

rewrite: Vercel CEO: AI Gateway now supports per-API-key spend limits — cost control goes per-tenant.
original: Grok Imagine Video on @vercel AI Gateway – the top image-to-video model on https://t.co/tN74yJZsfd https://t.co/hCSzh2JkKa

rewrite: Rauch 把 Vercel AI Gateway 的「按 API key 设消费上限」做成默认能力,从此 B2B 客户能按租户管 AI 成本——这是把 6-3 那条「Snowflake + v0 + Next.js」声明的工程落地。
original: Grok Imagine Video on @vercel AI Gateway – the top image-to-video model on https://t.co/tN74yJZsfd https://t.co/hCSzh2JkKa

rewrite: Box CEO Levie: enterprises adopting AI are still hiring, savings get reinvested into new lines of business.
original:
The jobs data coming out continues to suggest the opposite of what a lot of people had thought would happen. 

Just take engineering, as the prime example of the area with greatest AI impact (and perceived risk). Most companies now have far more software projects than ever before because of AI, and effectively only engineers are going to be the ones doing that work. 

You can get by for a while by being non-technical building software, but eventually someone has to understand what the thing is that got built, has to maintain it, has to fix security issues that come up, upgrade the systems beneath it, and so on. That's all jobs.

Now apply that to a number of other job functions. AI is going to cause companies to hire more in sales because agents can let them process more leads and do more customer research. AI will cause an explosion of new marketing roles because of how much more efficient it is to launch campaigns and target. The list goes on.

AI is going to have the opposite effect that lots of people thought on jobs.

rewrite: Levie 坚持他 6-3 的判断:大企业一边上 AI 一边还在招人,「省下来的钱」并没有变成裁员,而是变成新业务的种子轮。
original:
The jobs data coming out continues to suggest the opposite of what a lot of people had thought would happen. 

Just take engineering, as the prime example of the area with greatest AI impact (and perceived risk). Most companies now have far more software projects than ever before because of AI, and effectively only engineers are going to be the ones doing that work. 

You can get by for a while by being non-technical building software, but eventually someone has to understand what the thing is that got built, has to maintain it, has to fix security issues that come up, upgrade the systems beneath it, and so on. That's all jobs.

Now apply that to a number of other job functions. AI is going to cause companies to hire more in sales because agents can let them process more leads and do more customer research. AI will cause an explosion of new marketing roles because of how much more efficient it is to launch campaigns and target. The list goes on.

AI is going to have the opposite effect that lots of people thought on jobs.

rewrite: Ryan Lu on auto-review: helps new coders learn the codebase without senior hand-holding.
original:
Cursor is hiring design engineers.

looking for people with taste, systems thinking, and deep care for fast, polished experiences – especially folks excited to build the tools that help designers, engineers, and agents ship quality code.

know someone? tag them or DM me 📧
